---
title: "Modeling"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(ROSE)
library(glmnet)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(pROC)
library(MLmetrics)
```

```{r}
source("eda_preprocessing.R")
exists("diabetes_clean")
```

```{r}
dim(diabetes_clean)
```

```{r}
age_map <- c(
  "[0-10)"   =  5, "[10-20)"  = 15, "[20-30)"  = 25,
  "[30-40)"  = 35, "[40-50)"  = 45, "[50-60)"  = 55,
  "[60-70)"  = 65, "[70-80)"  = 75, "[80-90)"  = 85,
  "[90-100)" = 95
)

diabetes_clean$age_num <- age_map[diabetes_clean$age]

diabetes_clean %>% select(age, age_num) %>% head(5)
```

```{r}
med_cols <- c(
  "metformin", "repaglinide", "nateglinide", "chlorpropamide",
  "glimepiride", "acetohexamide", "glipizide", "glyburide",
  "tolbutamide", "pioglitazone", "rosiglitazone", "acarbose",
  "miglitol", "troglitazone", "tolazamide", "examide",
  "citoglipton", "insulin", "glyburide.metformin",
  "glipizide.metformin", "glimepiride.pioglitazone",
  "metformin.rosiglitazone", "metformin.pioglitazone"
)

diabetes_clean$num_active_meds <- rowSums(
  diabetes_clean[, med_cols] != "No"
)

diabetes_clean %>% select(insulin, metformin, num_active_meds) %>% head(5)
```

```{r}
icd_chapter <- function(code) {
  code <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(code))
  case_when(
    is.na(code)              ~ "Other",
    code >= 390 & code < 460 ~ "Circulatory",
    code >= 460 & code < 520 ~ "Respiratory",
    code >= 520 & code < 580 ~ "Digestive",
    code >= 580 & code < 630 ~ "Genitourinary",
    code >= 240 & code < 280 ~ "Endocrine",
    code >= 800 & code < 1000~ "Injury",
    code >= 140 & code < 240 ~ "Neoplasms",
    code >= 710 & code < 740 ~ "Musculoskeletal",
    code >= 290 & code < 320 ~ "Mental",
    TRUE                     ~ "Other"
  )
}

diabetes_clean$diag_1_cat <- icd_chapter(diabetes_clean$diag_1)
diabetes_clean$diag_2_cat <- icd_chapter(diabetes_clean$diag_2)
diabetes_clean$diag_3_cat <- icd_chapter(diabetes_clean$diag_3)

diabetes_clean %>% select(diag_1, diag_1_cat) %>% head(5)
```

```{r}
diabetes_model <- diabetes_clean %>%
  select(
    age_num, time_in_hospital, num_lab_procedures, num_procedures,
    num_medications, number_outpatient, number_emergency,
    number_inpatient, number_diagnoses, num_active_meds,
    race, gender, admission_type_id, discharge_disposition_id,
    admission_source_id, max_glu_serum, A1Cresult, change,
    diabetesMed, diag_1_cat, diag_2_cat, diag_3_cat,
    readmitted_binary
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(admission_type_id,
                  discharge_disposition_id,
                  admission_source_id), as.factor))

dim(diabetes_model)
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(diabetes_model$readmitted_binary))
```

```{r}
set.seed(503)

test_index <- createDataPartition(
  y    = diabetes_model$readmitted_binary,
  p    = 0.15,
  list = FALSE
)

test_set <- diabetes_model[ test_index, ]
temp_set <- diabetes_model[-test_index, ]

nrow(test_set)
nrow(temp_set)
```

```{r}
val_index <- createDataPartition(
  y    = temp_set$readmitted_binary,
  p    = 0.176,
  list = FALSE
)

val_set   <- temp_set[ val_index, ]
train_set <- temp_set[-val_index, ]

nrow(train_set)
nrow(val_set)
nrow(test_set)
```

```{r}
mean(train_set$readmitted_binary)
mean(val_set$readmitted_binary)
mean(test_set$readmitted_binary)
```

```{r}
train_balanced <- ROSE(
  readmitted_binary ~ .,
  data = train_set,
  seed = 503
)$data

prop.table(table(train_balanced$readmitted_binary))
```

```{r}
pre_proc <- preProcess(
  train_balanced %>% select(-readmitted_binary),
  method = c("center", "scale", "nzv")
)

X_train <- predict(pre_proc, train_balanced %>% select(-readmitted_binary))
X_val   <- predict(pre_proc, val_set        %>% select(-readmitted_binary))
X_test  <- predict(pre_proc, test_set       %>% select(-readmitted_binary))

y_train <- factor(train_balanced$readmitted_binary,
                  levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))
y_val   <- factor(val_set$readmitted_binary,
                  levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))
y_test  <- factor(test_set$readmitted_binary,
                  levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))

dim(X_train)
```

```{r}
cv_ctrl <- trainControl(
  method          = "cv",
  number          = 5,
  classProbs      = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)
```

```{r}
set.seed(503)
m1_lasso <- train(
  x         = X_train,
  y         = y_train,
  method    = "glmnet",
  family    = "binomial",
  trControl = cv_ctrl,
  metric    = "ROC",
  tuneGrid  = expand.grid(
    alpha  = 1,
    lambda = 10^seq(-4, 0, length.out = 20)
  )
)

print(m1_lasso)
```

```{r}
set.seed(503)
m2_rf <- train(
  x         = X_train,
  y         = y_train,
  method    = "rf",
  trControl = cv_ctrl,
  metric    = "ROC",
  tuneGrid  = data.frame(mtry = c(4, 6, 8, 10)),
  ntree     = 300
)

print(m2_rf)
```

```{r}
X_train_mat <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = X_train)
X_val_mat   <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = X_val)
X_test_mat  <- model.matrix(~ . - 1, data = X_test)
```

```{r}
set.seed(503)
shuffle_idx  <- sample(length(y_train))
X_train_mat  <- X_train_mat[shuffle_idx, ]
y_train_shuf <- y_train[shuffle_idx]
```

```{r}
set.seed(503)
m3_xgb <- train(
  x         = X_train_mat,
  y         = y_train_shuf,
  method    = "xgbTree",
  trControl = cv_ctrl,
  metric    = "ROC",
  tuneGrid  = expand.grid(
    nrounds          = c(100, 200),
    max_depth        = c(4, 6),
    eta              = c(0.05, 0.1),
    gamma            = 0,
    colsample_bytree = 0.8,
    min_child_weight = 1,
    subsample        = 0.8
  ),
  verbose = 0
)
```

```{r}
print(m3_xgb)
```

```{r}
evaluate_model <- function(model, X, y_true, model_name) {
  prob    <- predict(model, newdata = X, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
  pred    <- predict(model, newdata = X)
  roc_obj <- roc(response  = y_true,
                 predictor = prob,
                 levels    = c("No", "Yes"),
                 quiet     = TRUE)
  cm <- confusionMatrix(pred, y_true, positive = "Yes")
  
  list(
    roc  = roc_obj,
    cm   = cm,
    auc  = as.numeric(auc(roc_obj)),
    probs = prob,
    name = model_name
  )
}
```

```{r}
val_m1 <- evaluate_model(m1_lasso, X_val,     y_val, "Logistic (LASSO)")
val_m2 <- evaluate_model(m2_rf,    X_val,     y_val, "Random Forest")
val_m3 <- evaluate_model(m3_xgb,   X_val_mat, y_val, "XGBoost")
```

```{r}
cat("Logistic (LASSO):\n")
cat("AUC:", round(val_m1$auc, 4), "\n")
cat("Sensitivity:", round(val_m1$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"], 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(val_m1$cm$byClass["Specificity"], 4), "\n\n")

cat("Random Forest:\n")
cat("AUC:", round(val_m2$auc, 4), "\n")
cat("Sensitivity:", round(val_m2$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"], 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(val_m2$cm$byClass["Specificity"], 4), "\n\n")

cat("XGBoost:\n")
cat("AUC:", round(val_m3$auc, 4), "\n")
cat("Sensitivity:", round(val_m3$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"], 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity:", round(val_m3$cm$byClass["Specificity"], 4), "\n")
```

```{r}
plot(val_m1$roc, col = "steelblue",  lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation Set ROC Curves")
plot(val_m2$roc, col = "darkorange", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(val_m3$roc, col = "darkgreen",  lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
legend("bottomright",
       legend = c(
         paste0("Logistic (AUC = ",      round(val_m1$auc, 3), ")"),
         paste0("Random Forest (AUC = ", round(val_m2$auc, 3), ")"),
         paste0("XGBoost (AUC = ",       round(val_m3$auc, 3), ")")
       ),
       col = c("steelblue", "darkorange", "darkgreen"),
       lwd = 2)
```

```{r}
test_result <- evaluate_model(m3_xgb, X_test_mat, y_test, "XGBoost — Final Test")

cat("AUC:         ", round(test_result$auc, 4), "\n")
cat("Sensitivity: ", round(test_result$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"], 4), "\n")
cat("Specificity: ", round(test_result$cm$byClass["Specificity"], 4), "\n")
cat("F1 Score:    ", round(test_result$cm$byClass["F1"], 4), "\n")
cat("Balanced Acc:", round(test_result$cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"], 4), "\n\n")
cat("Confusion Matrix:\n")
print(test_result$cm$table)
```

```{r}
var_imp <- varImp(m3_xgb, scale = TRUE)
plot(var_imp, top = 20, main = "Top 20 Variable Importances — XGBoost")
```

```{r}
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Model       = c("Logistic (LASSO)", "Random Forest", "XGBoost"),
  Val_AUC     = round(c(val_m1$auc, val_m2$auc, val_m3$auc), 4),
  Val_Sens    = round(c(
    val_m1$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"],
    val_m2$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"],
    val_m3$cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
  ), 4),
  Val_Spec    = round(c(
    val_m1$cm$byClass["Specificity"],
    val_m2$cm$byClass["Specificity"],
    val_m3$cm$byClass["Specificity"]
  ), 4),
  Val_F1      = round(c(
    val_m1$cm$byClass["F1"],
    val_m2$cm$byClass["F1"],
    val_m3$cm$byClass["F1"]
  ), 4)
)

print(summary_df)
```
